series_metadata.series_description: Descriptions of the duties performed by employees upon which department of personnel bases its classification action and determines the position number and title and the pay range of all positions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain while position is still relevant; or until position is obsolete, superseded or replaced and once position description has been audited by the Ohio Department of Administrative Services. ; Electronic: Retain while position is still relevant; or until position is obsolete, superseded or replaced and once position description has been audited by the Ohio Department of Administrative Services., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
